title: Extract MIGRATION_PLAN.md into domus tasks and specs
summary: MIGRATION_PLAN.md contains phases, steps, and completion state that belongs in the domus task system. Extract remaining work as tasks, archive completed phases as specs or history, then remove MIGRATION_PLAN.md and the reference to it in CLAUDE.md's Capturing Knowledge section.

title: Repair existing idea MD files to current format
summary: Old idea MD files predate the current CLI and use stale fields (Date, Project) without a Status field. Rename Date to Captured, add Status, drop Project, and make updateMarkdownStatus insert the line if missing.
outcome_note: Completed 2026-03-14. Repaired idea MD headers to current format via commit 9520064c.

title: Create doctor skill for domus store validation
summary: Skill that validates a single project's domus store: JSONL/MD frontmatter sync, open task status accuracy vs git log, schema integrity (field names, required fields present). Returns a concise report. Process: list tasks/ideas via --json, spot-read MD headers, cross-ref open tasks against git log, flag any drift. Runs as background subagent since it mostly returns all-ok. Skill lives in .claude/skills/doctor/SKILL.md.
outcome_note: Deprioritised — will revisit once more migration work is done and domus store has more content to validate.

title: Migrate transactions screen to Vue
summary: Port the Angular transactions screen to Vue. Cover the full feature set: listing, filtering, pagination, manual entry, import, categorisation, edit/delete. Follow the types → API → store → components → routes pattern.

title: Migrate budget list screen to Vue
summary: Port the budget list screen to Vue. Also wire up the 'Current Budget' menu item: calls GET /budgets/current, gets the budget ID, navigates to /budgets/:id. The current budget shortcut is not a separate screen — just a menu command.

title: Migrate sink funds screen to Vue
summary: Port the sink funds screen from Angular to Vue. Follow the types → API → store → components → routes pattern.

title: Migrate account balances screen to Vue
summary: Port the account balances screen from Angular to Vue. Follow the types → API → store → components → routes pattern.

title: Migrate special events screen to Vue
summary: Port the special events screen from Angular to Vue. Follow the types → API → store → components → routes pattern.

title: Migrate reports screens to Vue
summary: Port the three reports screens (Net Worth, Category Spending, Needs vs Wants) from Angular to Vue. Follow the types → API → store → components → routes pattern.

title: Migrate transaction import to Vue
summary: Port the transaction import dialog and ABN Amro bank + credit card importer services to Vue. Depends on the core transactions screen migration.

title: Migrate account transfer to Vue
summary: Port the account transfer dialog to Vue. Covers from/to bank account selectors with live balance preview, allocation/sink-fund-allocation selectors, date, description, amount, and POST /bank_accounts/:id/transfer. Depends on the core transactions screen migration.

title: Migrate transaction calculator to Vue
summary: Port the floating transaction selection calculator to Vue. Shows total of checked transactions when 1+ are selected, with a Clear button. Self-contained: reads selected flag from transaction store. Depends on the core transactions screen migration.

title: Redesign transactions screen UX
summary: Implement the agreed UX redesign for the transactions screen. The full spec is in the body of migrate-transactions-screen-to-vue task. Covers: toolbar layout, summary bar (3-column 2-row), calculator mode trigger (Σ toggle + reserved checkbox column), table density, wrap/truncate toggle, edit mode button placement.

title: Add highlightZero prop to EcMoneyField
summary: Add a highlightZero boolean prop to EcMoneyField. When true: zero value renders green, non-zero (both positive and negative) renders red. Needed by the transactions redesign for Diff and Unpaid Diff fields.

title: Refactor transactions screen components before UX redesign
summary: Review the current Vue transactions implementation and identify modularization opportunities. Goal: make the upcoming UX redesign (redesign-transactions-screen-ux) easier to execute by ensuring components have focused responsibilities and clean boundaries. Start by reading the transaction screen files in webclientv4/src/app/transactions/ and forming an assessment of what should change and why.

title: Add domus vision framing to project CLAUDE.md
summary: Add a short section to the everycent CLAUDE.md (and eventually a template for other projects) that frames what domus is and how to work with it — the vision, the four pillars, and the key workflow patterns (context mobility, task bodies as living docs, autonomous bar definition). Helps orient any session that involves domus work.

title: Standardise mount helper to createWrapper across all specs
summary: All component unit test files should use createWrapper as the name for their mount helper function. Apply this convention to all specs in webclientv4 that use a different name (e.g. mountList, mountForm, mountComponent, etc.).

title: Link transactions to budgets by foreign key instead of date range
summary: Currently transactions are associated with a budget purely by their date falling within the budget's start/end range. Change this so transactions record the budget_id they belong to directly. The date range becomes validation only, not the primary relationship. Requires a Rails migration (add budget_id to transactions), API changes, and frontend updates.

title: Migrate budget view/edit screen to Vue
summary: Port the single budget view/edit screen (/budgets/:id) from Angular to Vue. Shows a budget's incomes and allocations grouped by category, with edit mode for add/edit/delete. This is the most-used screen after transactions.

title: Budget view — page shell, store, and API
summary: Skeleton BudgetPage.vue at /budgets/:id, budgetStore.ts (Pinia), extend budgetApi.ts with get(id) and save(). Toolbar with Back to Budget List, View Transactions, Edit/Save/Cancel. Loads budget by ID with allocation categories, sets heading.

title: Budget view — incomes table
summary: Incomes section with Name, Amount, Bank Account dropdown, Comment columns. Sticky header, total footer. Edit mode: inline editing, add income, soft delete with undo.

title: Budget view — allocations table
summary: Allocations section with Name, Amount, Spent, Remaining, Class, Fixed Amount?, Comment columns. Grouped by allocation category with sticky sub-headers. Category subtotals, grand total footer with Unallocated badge. Edit mode: inline editing, add allocation per category, soft delete.

title: Budget view — show transactions dialog
summary: Eye icon on the Spent column in the allocations table opens a dialog showing transactions for that allocation. Needs compact transaction list component and API call to fetch transactions by allocation ID.

title: Budget view — summary section
summary: Summary below allocations table: Total Discretionary Amount (income minus allocations), split per person for couples. Wants Summary table showing Needs/Wants/Savings totals with percentages. Uses settings for family_type and person names.

title: Sink funds — page shell, store, API, types, route
summary: Create the page shell, Pinia store, API layer, TypeScript types, and route for the sink funds screen. Foundation for subtasks 2-5.

title: Sink funds — allocations table
summary: Standalone SinkFundAllocationTable.vue showing all allocations with Name, Current Balance, Target, Outstanding, Comment, Status columns. Inline editing in edit mode.

title: Sink funds — summary section
summary: Account balance row, unassigned money row at top of table, and totals footer row with assigned balance total, target total, and outstanding total.

title: Sink funds — transfer dialog
summary: PrimeVue Dialog for transferring money between sink fund allocations. From/To dropdowns include Unassigned Money option. Amount field. Save calls POST /sink_funds/:id/transfer_allocation.

title: Sink funds — show transactions dialog
summary: Eye icon on Current Balance column opens a PrimeVue Dialog showing transactions for that sink fund allocation via GET /transactions/by_sink_fund_allocation.

title: CAMT.053 bank statement import
summary: New feature: import transactions from ABN AMRO CAMT.053 zip export (ISO 20022) via a dedicated import page. Frontend parses zip+XML in browser, backend handles preview (dedup, period filtering, IBAN matching) and bulk save (all-or-nothing).

title: DB migration: external_transaction_id and is_manual
summary: Add external_transaction_id (string, nullable, indexed) and is_manual (boolean, default true) columns to transactions table. Add before_create callback to Transaction model that assigns MAN-{SecureRandom.hex(8)} when external_transaction_id is blank.

title: CAMT.053 frontend parser
summary: TypeScript module that takes a zip File, extracts XML files using JSZip, parses CAMT.053 entries using DOMParser, and returns structured transaction data grouped by IBAN. Handles description extraction for all transaction types (BEA/GEA merchant names, SEPA /NAME/ fields, international best-effort). Converts amounts to cents. Deduplicates across XML files by AcctSvcrRef. Lazy-loaded via dynamic import.

title: Import preview backend endpoint
summary: New endpoint that accepts parsed CAMT transactions (IBAN, AcctSvcrRef, date, amount, description per entry). Resolves IBANs to bank_account_ids, checks AcctSvcrRef duplicates against existing transactions, flags out-of-budget-period entries, flags unmatched IBANs. Returns enriched transaction list with status flags (duplicate, out_of_period, unmatched_account) and bank account balances. Single endpoint, modular internal functions (match_accounts, filter_budget_period, check_duplicates) each independently testable.

title: Bulk import save backend endpoint
summary: New endpoint that accepts confirmed transactions grouped by bank account. Creates all transactions in a single DB transaction (all-or-nothing). Sets external_transaction_id to AcctSvcrRef, is_manual to false. Validates budget period server-side. Returns created transaction counts per account and updated balances.

title: Import page UI
summary: New Vue page at /import route. File input for CAMT.053 zip. On file select, parses via frontend parser, calls preview endpoint, displays results grouped by account. Each account group shows: account name, transaction table (date, description, amount, status flags), balance for manual verification. Duplicate transactions greyed out, out-of-period marked as deleted, unmatched IBANs flagged. Confirm button triggers bulk save. Success/error notifications.

title: Allocation auto-suggest in import preview
summary: V2 feature: during import preview, suggest allocation_id for each transaction by fuzzy-matching description against previous budget's transactions. Two-hop lookup: match description (starts-with/contains) to find previous transaction's allocation, then resolve to current budget's allocation by name. Auto-assigned in preview, user fixes exceptions before save. Sink fund accounts excluded from auto-suggest (sink_fund_allocation_id assignment doesn't follow same pattern).

title: Wire domus staff roles into Claude Code via skills
summary: Claude doesn't discover .domus/reference/staff/roles/ automatically. Create skills (/refine, /dispatch) that load the relevant role files (taskmaster.md, foreman.md, worker.md) so the user can say 'advance and dispatch' and Claude knows the workflow. Skills are the natural fit — role files stay as reference docs, skills wire them into the right moments.
